articles.title: Dell (DELL) Launches PowerEdge XE8812 To Push Deeper Into Rack Scale AI
articles.description: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) has introduced the PowerEdge XE8812 server featuring NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL4 architecture. The system is designed for high performance AI, scientific and engineering workloads with direct liquid cooling. This launch positions Dell within the emerging shift from standalone GPU servers to integrated, rack scale AI infrastructure. The company is supplying systems to large AI and supercomputing customers, including CoreWeave and Lawrence Berkeley National...

articles.title: IN CASE YOU MISSED IT: Madonna reveals why biopic was axed
articles.description: The Material Girl said the main reason the biopic was shelved was the budget. "I was supposed to make a movie about my life. I worked on my script for two years and spent two years at Universal Studios with the line producers doing budgeting and casting," she told Interview magazine. She continued, "We had a falling out, me and Universal, regarding budget. I've had an extraordinary life. I've had a huge life, so I needed a big budget. You know what I mean?"
